parameters.content:
## WhatsApp Career Ranking Bot
Analyze resumes via WhatsApp to provide career scores, ATS feedback, and ranking insights.


### How it works
1. User triggers bot via keyword.

2. Collects name, target role, and PDF resume.

3. Scoring Engine calculates metrics.

4. AI identifies rejection reasons.

5. Returns personalized report to user.

## 1. Trigger & State
Handles WhatsApp webhook and manages user conversation progress in Supabase.

## 2. Processing & Analysis
Downloads resume, extracts text, performs scoring, and generates AI improvement suggestions.
